The LIV Hospitality Design Awards takes pride in acknowledging the outstanding contributions of some of the industry’s most brilliant minds.

After a multi-round of votes, the jury members select the winners in professional and student categories. JURY MEMBERS

LIV Hospitality Design Awards is an annual design competition { architecture & Interior Design} dedicated to the Hospitality industry, split into two key divisions: Living Space and Eating Space. All entries are voted on by a grand jury panel composed of experienced and prominent academics, professionals, press members, entrepreneurs, and developers in the Hospitality, Architecture, and Interior Design fields. ABOUT THE LIV HOSPITALITY DESIGN AWARDS

LIV Hospitality Design Awards recognize excellence in hospitality architecture, interior design, and guest experiences: on a global scale.

The mission of the LIV Hospitality Design Awards is to celebrate the quality and diversity of the architectural ventures and interior design projects shaping the worldwide hospitality industry today. The program was launched in 2020 and is an inclusive platform, pursuing and rewardi
